notes: Uses Claude Code CLI in headless mode (-p with --output-format stream-json).
Project-local .claude/agents/*.md files are auto-loaded from the project directory.
isolate_home defaults to false so Claude subscription auth (read from ~/.claude/) works. Set to true only when auth is via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and you want strict user-level agent isolation.
Per-variant command_prefix overrides the leading ['claude'] — used here to invoke Ollama Cloud models through the user's `ollama launch claude` shim.

variants.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6 alone (Claude Code, subscription auth)
variants.selection_reason: Pure Sonnet through the Claude Code CLI on the Python (Django + Channels + LangChain) brief. Same prompt as the opencode runs. Direct comparison vs claude_sonnet_4_6 in config/models.json (same model, different harness). Uses Claude subscription auth — no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY required.

variants.label: Kimi K2.6 (Ollama Cloud) via Claude Code
variants.selection_reason: User-recommended Ollama Cloud model — state-of-the-art coding + long-horizon execution + multimodal agent swarm. Direct comparison vs kimi_k2_6 in config/models.json (Moonshot Kimi via OpenRouter through opencode): same model family, different harness AND different provider, isolating where the LangChain hallucinations come from.

variants.label: GLM 5.1 (Ollama Cloud) via Claude Code
variants.selection_reason: Long-horizon agentic engineering with autonomous execution and sustained iteration. Tests whether GLM 5.1's multi-turn agentic behavior produces a complete Django + Channels + LangChain app within the no_progress_timeout.

variants.label: Qwen 3.5 (Ollama Cloud) via Claude Code
variants.selection_reason: Reasoning, coding, and agentic tool use with vision. Tests whether Qwen 3.5's reasoning carries through to correct LangChain wiring (ChatAnthropic vs ChatOpenAI, anthropic-compat endpoint, streaming hooks).
